title: Pan-Seared Squid with Citrusy Stew
description: A flavorful and refreshing dish that combines the tender squid with a tangy citrus stew. This recipe is perfect for a light and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the squid and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until browned.
Remove the squid from the skillet and set aside.
Add the white wine to the skillet and cook until reduced by half.
Add the lemon juice to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Return the squid to the skillet and toss to coat with the citrus stew.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the squid with the citrus stew spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
